falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 20-day average on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a major price move (either bullish or bearish) contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of stagnation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would confirm a topping pattern, directly contradicting the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern's implication of a reversal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
